STEP 10 — DASHBOARD CREDS
==========================

$ cat /var/log/hermes-bootstrap-credentials.log

  # Hermes Dashboard credentials
  # Generated by bootstrap.sh on 2026-06-28T02:33:10Z
  # Save these — they are not stored in plaintext anywhere else.
  URL:      http://192.168.0.220:9119
  Username: admin
  Password: GkdzPb7NiBs4YLIqoAdG

Health: HTTP 302 (auth gate active — redirect to /login)
System unit: hermes-dashboard.service (installed + running)

These creds were generated by THIS fresh bootstrap run, NOT inherited from the partial prior run
(prior partial had password 1CUPR9aSOyKRp7t0WZuX; this run has GkdzPb7NiBs4YLIqoAdG).
